micro_rules: Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.
Use value entries in conditions and function entries in actions.

rows.command_eng: Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.
When the oven enters heating mode, switch it to microwave mode after 3 seconds.

rows.command_kor: 공기청정기를 자동 모드로 설정하고 2시간 뒤에 수면 모드로 설정해줘.
